case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS GRAYS, NICOLE

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF (CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO REQUEST TO CORRECT JUDGMENT.
PLFT'S MOTION TO CORRECT JUDGMENT FILED 11/05/02, GRANTED. JUDGMENT AMEMDED PER SITPULATION. SEE FOLDER FOR DETAILS.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,707.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT GRAYS, NICOLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRAYS, NICOLE $1,567.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,593.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GRAYS, NICOLE
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GRAYS, NICOLE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRAYS, NICOLE $1,567.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,593.00, JUDGMENT IS AMENDED AS FOLLOWS: PURSUANT TO STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES, DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $35.00 PER MONTH. PARTIES AGREED THAT PAYMENTS ARE DUE BY THE 30TH OF EACH MONTH. PARTIES AGREED THAT PAYMENTS WERE TO BEGIN 9/30/02 JUDGMENT IS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1567.00 + COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $26.00 REMAIN UNCHANGED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
